text.title: On-Call Rotation Setup Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when on-call-rotation-setup is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Same engineer holds 80% of weekend shifts because they 'volunteered'.
antipattern.note: Fix: Quarterly fairness audit; rebalance with peer agreement.

antipattern.description: Primary is on vacation; nothing pages because rotation lacked secondary.
antipattern.note: Fix: Add secondary tier; SLA defined.

antipattern.description: On-call is unpaid 'professional duty'; burnout drives 30% annual attrition.
antipattern.note: Fix: Explicit comp; review against market every 12 months.
